elements.description: Top left: stamped text '62-83894', 'RECORDED-30', 'EX - 69', and red handwritten number '285'. Top right: typed text 'REGISTERED AIR MAIL'. Bottom: red stamped date 'AUG 13 1952', stamped text 'COMM - FBI' and 'AUG 11 1952 MAILED 30'. Bottom right: black handwritten cursive signature or initials. Bottom left: typed list of names under column 'Tolon', 'Ladd', 'Nichols', etc.

judge.reason: The two descriptions contradict each other on specific stamped and typed text (e.g., '245' vs. '285'; Description B includes multiple specific stamps like '62-83894' and 'RECORDED-30' not mentioned in A), indicating at least one is fabricating visual details.
